ddls:
CREATE TABLE "charging_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charging station */,
  "charging_station_set_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the set of charging stations */,
  "charging_load_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of charging load */,
  "transportation_device_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of transportation devices supported */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the charging station is located */,
  "max_charging_power" INTEGER /* Maximum charging power in watts */,
  "guid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the charging station (GUID) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the charging station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the charging station (e.g., active, maintenance, out of service) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the charging station's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the charging station's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charging_stations_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charging_stations_charging_station_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("charging_station_set_id") REFERENCES charging_station_sets ("set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charging_stations_transportation_device_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("transportation_device_category_id") REFERENCES transportation_device_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charging_stations_charging_load_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("charging_load_type_id") REFERENCES charging_load_types ("load_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charging_station_sets" (
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of charging stations */,
  "set_name" TEXT /* Name of the set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the set */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the set of charging stations was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check for the set */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the set (e.g., active, maintenance, out of service) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charging_load_types" (
  "load_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of charging load */,
  "load_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the charging load type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the charging load type */,
  "max_power" INTEGER /* Maximum power output for the charging load type in watts */,
  "min_power" INTEGER /* Minimum power output for the charging load type in watts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("load_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transportation_device_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category of transportation devices */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "average_charging_time" REAL /* Average time required to fully charge a device in this category */,
  "power_consumption_rate" REAL /* Average power consumption rate for devices in this category in kWh per hour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the site */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the site */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site manager (foreign key to the users table) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charging_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charging session */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charging station used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the charging session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the charging session */,
  "energy_consumed" REAL /* Energy consumed during the session in kWh */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., completed, interrupted) */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being charged (foreign key to the vehicles table) */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of charging session (e.g., fast, slow) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the charging session in the local currency */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, mobile payment) */,
  "charge_rate" REAL /* Charging rate during the session in kWh per hour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charging_sessions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charging_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charging_sessions_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES charging_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., maintenance staff, site manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_name" TEXT /* Name or model of the vehicle */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the vehicle */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the vehicle (foreign key to the users table) */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vehicle */,
  "battery_capacity" REAL /* Battery capacity of the vehicle in kWh */,
  "last_charged_date" TEXT /* Date of the last charging session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES transportation_device_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
